title: TODO: short title
description: The server has 28,000 TCP sockets in TIME_WAIT state, exhausting the local port range and preventing new outbound connections. Applications are failing with "Cannot assign requested address". The TIME_WAIT count must be reduced to 500 and port exhaustion cleared, with the service state set to stable.
hint_1: read /opt/winlab/real-server/socket.state to see the socket count
hint_2: port_exhaustion=true confirms no ports are left
hint_3: Enable tcp_tw_reuse or reduce connection rate to drop TIME_WAIT count; then set time_wait=500 and port_exhaustion=false
